demo.title: xquik-discovery.sh
demo.code:
curl -fsSL https://xquik.com/.well-known/mcp.json | jq .
curl -fsSL https://xquik.com/openapi.json | jq '.info.title'

setup: Install Hermes Tweet from https://github.com/Xquik-dev/hermes-tweet for Hermes Agent workflows.
Store XQUIK_API_KEY in your agent or MCP client secret store for authenticated workflows.
Enable HERMES_TWEET_ENABLE_ACTIONS=true only when tweet actions are intentionally approved.
